query:
SELECT
                    result.run_id,
                    result.deal_id,
                    result.piece_index,
                    result.piece_cid,
                    result.url_tested
               FROM
                    deal_sli_piece_results result
               WHERE
                    result.run_id = $1
                    AND result.success
                    AND NOT EXISTS (
                        SELECT
                            1
                        FROM
                            deal_sli_bms_jobs job
                        WHERE
                            job.run_id = result.run_id
                            AND job.piece_index = result.piece_index
                            AND job.url_tested = result.url_tested
                    )
               ORDER BY
                    result.piece_index ASC,
                    result.url_tested ASC
